title: Check and restart discord ingest and heartbeat

log.context: Check and restart discord ingest and heartbeat

Here's the full picture:

**discord-ingest.service** — has been failing on every timer run since at least yesterday. Root cause: `/mnt/data/scripts/discord_ingest_incremental.py` does not exist. The service unit references a script that was never created (or was deleted). The log shows the same `No such file or directory` error on every attempt going back many hours.

**heartbeat.service** — does not exist at all. No service file, no timer, nothing with that name registered in systemd.
